# Diagnostics and Multiple Comparisons for Oneway ANOVA {#one-way-models-2}

```{r one-way-models-2-chapter-setup, include=FALSE}
source("../shared/setup.R")

knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  fig.path = "_main_files/figure-html/one-way-models-2-",
  cache.path = "../build/cache/book/one-way-models-2/"
)
```

```{r child-one-way-models-2, child="../lecture-content/20-one-way-models-2.Rmd"}
```
